prompt: Break this spec into stories for sprint planning. The spec covers user authentication with SSO, magic link, and password flows. Each flow should work independently. The primary persona is an enterprise IT admin for SSO, and an individual user for magic link and password.
assertions: Stories are grouped by persona (enterprise IT admin for SSO, individual user for magic link/password)
SSO, magic link, and password are separate epics or story groups
Each story is completable in 1-3 days by one engineer
Acceptance criteria use Given/When/Then format or equivalent testable statements
Error states are covered for each auth flow (invalid credentials, expired links, SSO provider down)
